name: Butanooo! Simulator
short_description: I got you a job delivering butane. You will have to drive the delivery van, pump gas and deliver fast with the forklift. You will have a helper for miscellaneous tasks. Remember to use the nearest bathroom and put your music on the radio. Don't buy anything from beggars. Good luck!
detailed_description:
How are you, Paco? How are you? It's me Er Pelusa.
You told me that if I knew of any job to let you know, so I got you a good job.

You're going to work delivering butane gas:
You have a license, don't you, because you're going to have to drive the van loaded with butane around the neighborhood.
- You can tune the van if you want.
- Remember to put gas in it
- Distribute the butane to the neighbors in the neighborhood, so they can take a hot shower.
- You can use the wheelbarrow to go faster
- We'll give you a helper so you can put him to deliver butane, load the truck or send him to buy tobacco.
- If you're going to take a shit, go to the nearest toilet.
- You have a radio so play whatever music you want on it.
- And above all don't buy anything from the beggars in the neighborhood.

Ala Paco have a good picha.

supported_languages:
Spanish - Spain*, English, French, Italian, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
